# opnsense_interface_gre (Resource)

Manages a GRE tunnel interface on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `local_address` (String) Local tunnel endpoint address (must exist on the parent interface).
- `parent_interface` (String) Parent interface the tunnel runs over.
- `remote_address` (String) Remote tunnel endpoint address.
- `tunnel_local_address` (String) Local inside (tunnel) address.
- `tunnel_remote_address` (String) Remote inside (tunnel) address.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `device` (String) Assigned GRE device name (auto-assigned by OPNsense).
- `tunnel_remote_net` (Number) Tunnel remote network prefix length.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
